caption.full:
Jodie Comer and Harry Melling's musical Stuffed opens TIFF 2026.

The gloriously twisted musical film Stuffed will open the 2026 Discovery program at the Toronto International Film Festival. Jodie Comer stars as a taxidermist who longs to stuff a human specimen in the film where love, death, and taxidermy collide.

What drew you to this twisted musical — the premise, the cast, or the festival spotlight?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #TIFF2026 #StuffedMovie #JodieComer
caption.firstComment: That taxidermy romance angle feels so unsettling — are you team horrified curiosity or team dark comedy for this opener?

youtube.title: Jodie Comer: 'Most Scared' in Twisted Musical 'Stuffed'
youtube.description:
Jodie Comer stars as a taxidermist in the musical film 'Stuffed,' set to open the 2026 TIFF Discovery program. The film, described as a 'gloriously twisted musical,' features an unexpected romance where love, death, and taxidermy collide. Harry Melling also stars in the movie.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
